prompt: Create a polished anime-style half-body portrait of an extremely handsome adult man standing in an upscale high-rise bar at night, with a dramatic city skyline visible through tall windows behind him. He has platinum blond layered tousled medium-length hair with long side bangs and sharp luminous highlights, an elegant neck and broad shoulders, and a confident fashionable presence. His face should be mostly obscured by a centered square privacy censor block in a warm beige-to-dark-gray vertical gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving hair, ears, jawline edges, neck, and upper torso visible. Dress him in a cream-white tailored blazer over an unbuttoned black dress shirt with exactly 3 visible gold buttons, open low enough to reveal a toned chest and collarbones. The background should show exactly 2 main environment zones: on the left, a nighttime skyscraper cityscape with many blue-white window lights and red antenna dots; on the right, a warm luxury bar shelf area with dark wood, golden lighting, bottles, and a glowing rectangular wall sconce. Use cinematic warm indoor lighting mixed with cool blue city light, crisp clean line art, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, a slightly romantic host-club atmosphere, vertical portrait composition cropped at mid-torso, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
